title: Visual Cognate Mapping
goal: Build immediate success and metalinguistic awareness through play. Help children see the shared DNA of English and Spanish through words that look and sound the same in both languages.

books.title: The Biliteracy Ladder: Step 1 — Visual Cognate Coloring Book
books.titleEs: La Escalera de Biliteracidad: Paso 1 — Libro para Colorear de Cognados Visuales
books.description: This full-colour coloring book introduces young children to Perfect Cognates — words that look and sound nearly identical in English and Spanish, like Elefante/Elephant and Banana/Banano. Through fun coloring and parental guidance, children discover words in both languages.
books.highlights: Ages 2-4 | 60+ cognate pairs | Coloring book for toddlers | Gift book & first biliteracy tool

title: Tracing & First Words
goal: Develop fine motor skills and vocabulary simultaneously. Move from visual recognition to physical production — tracing letter forms while building high-frequency vocabulary in both languages.

books.title: The Biliteracy Ladder: Step 2 — Tracing & First Words, Book 1
books.titleEs: La Escalera de Biliteracidad: Paso 2 — Trazado y Primeras Palabras, Libro 1
books.description: The first of two Step 2 workbooks pairs handwriting practice with cognate-first vocabulary. Children trace letter forms and write their first bilingual words. Pen control exercises scaled from pre-writing to full letter tracing.
books.highlights: Ages 3-5 | Pen control exercises | High-frequency bilingual vocab | Cognate-first approach | Black and white interior

books.title: The Biliteracy Ladder: Step 2 — Tracing & First Words, Book 2
books.titleEs: La Escalera de Biliteracidad: Paso 2 — Trazado y Primeras Palabras, Libro 2
books.description: Extends tracing into first sentences and bilingual word families. Builds on Book 1 with more complex letter patterns and expands vocabulary into full bilingual word families.
books.highlights: Ages 3-5 | First sentences | Bilingual word families | Builds on Book 1

title: ABC Bridge
goal: Connect the alphabet to bilingual phonics. Build the bridge between letter recognition and reading readiness in both languages simultaneously.

books.title: The Biliteracy Ladder: Step 3 — ABC Bridge Workbook
books.titleEs: La Escalera de Biliteracidad: Paso 3 — Cuaderno ABC Bridge
books.description: The flagship Step 3 workbook connecting alphabet mastery to bilingual phonics and early reading readiness. Children move from recognizing letters to understanding how they sound differently in English and Spanish.
books.highlights: Ages 4-6 | Bilingual phonics | Alphabet mastery | Reading readiness

title: First Reader
goal: Transition from letter recognition to independent reading. Build reading fluency and comprehension in both English and Spanish.

books.title: The Biliteracy Ladder: Step 4 — First Reader, Book 1
books.titleEs: La Escalera de Biliteracidad: Paso 4 — Primer Lector, Libro 1
books.description: Guided bilingual reading for emerging readers. Simple sentences with full bilingual support help children build confidence reading independently in both languages.
books.highlights: Ages 5-7 | Leveled reading | Bilingual comprehension | Independent reading

title: Story Builder
goal: Develop narrative skills and creative writing in both languages. Move from reading to composing original bilingual stories.

books.title: The Biliteracy Ladder: Step 5 — Story Builder Workbook
books.titleEs: La Escalera de Biliteracidad: Paso 5 — Cuaderno Story Builder
books.description: Guided creative writing in both languages. Children build their own bilingual stories from structured prompts, developing narrative skills simultaneously in English and Spanish.
books.highlights: Ages 6-8 | Creative writing | Bilingual story prompts | Narrative development

title: Dino Verbs
goal: Master verb conjugation and sentence complexity in both languages through engaging dinosaur-themed activities.

books.title: The Biliteracy Ladder: Step 6 — Dino Verbs Workbook
books.titleEs: La Escalera de Biliteracidad: Paso 6 — Cuaderno Dino Verbos
books.description: Dinosaur-powered verb mastery in English and Spanish. The most engaging way to conquer conjugation — children learn present, past, and future tense through beloved dinosaur characters.
books.highlights: Ages 6-9 | Verb conjugation | Present/past/future tense | Dinosaur theme
